items.title: RLI's Q3 Earnings, Revenues Beat Estimates on Solid Underwriting
items.description: RLI posts strong Q3 numbers, with earnings and revenues beating estimates, fueled by solid underwriting and investment income growth.

items.title: W.R. Berkley Q3 Earnings, Revenues Top on Solid Underwriting
items.description: W.R. Berkley posts strong Q3 results as underwriting and investment income power an 18% earnings jump and a revenue beat.
